name: dead-code-auditor
description: Surgical dead code audit: orphan files, unused symbols, dead params, and commented-out code

changes: Initial release — six dead code categories: orphan files, unused classes/functions, dead methods/getters, unused constructor parameters, unused imports, commented-out code
Evidence-first methodology: every finding backed by cross-project grep search
Language-aware edge case handling: DI containers, reflection, code generation, re-export barrels, abstract classes
Risk classification: 🟢 Low / 🟡 Medium / 🔴 High with language-specific guidance
Structured Markdown report with executive summary table
Post-audit offer to generate removal plan via claude-mem:make-plan
